items.title_en: Vinted boss sees 'fundamental' shift in consumer patterns, as secondhand firm notches $9 billion valuation
items.title_zh: Vinted 老板认为消费者模式发生“根本性”转变，二手公司估值达 90 亿美元
items.desc_en: Vinted is seeing a structural shift in consumer behaviour as habits form around the resale economy, its marketplace CEO told CNBC.
items.desc_zh: Vinted 市场首席执行官告诉 CNBC，随着转售经济习惯的形成，消费者行为发生了结构性转变。

items.title_en: Upstart chipmakers keep challenging Nvidia. This time it's Microsoft-backed D-Matrix
items.title_zh: 新贵芯片制造商不断挑战英伟达。这次是微软支持的 D-Matrix
items.desc_en: Nvidia challenger D-Matrix is entering full production of an AI chip it says is 10 times faster than a GPU and bypasses the memory shortage.
items.desc_zh: Nvidia 的挑战者 D-Matrix 正在全面生产一款 AI 芯片，据称其速度比 GPU 快 10 倍，并绕过了内存短缺的问题。

items.title_en: Sea drone rescues US army helicopter crew near Strait of Hormuz
items.title_zh: 海上无人机在霍尔木兹海峡附近营救美军直升机机组人员
items.desc_en: An uncrewed vessel picked up two crew members of an Apache helicopter that went down on Monday, US officials tells CBS News.
items.desc_zh: 美国官员告诉哥伦比亚广播公司新闻，一艘无人船救起了周一坠毁的阿帕奇直升机的两名机组人员。

items.title_en: SpaceX employee group creates low-fee wealth management option with Choreo for post-IPO
items.title_zh: SpaceX 员工团体与 Choreo 合作为 IPO 后创建低费用财富管理选项
items.desc_en: The deal marks a bold experiment in the wealth management industry that could shift the balance of power from advisory firms to wealthy groups of investors.
items.desc_zh: 这笔交易标志着财富管理行业的一次大胆尝试，可能会将权力平衡从咨询公司转移到富裕的投资者群体。

items.title_en: Rivian is betting on its R2 EV to turn the automaker into a household name like Tesla
items.title_zh: Rivian 押注于其 R2 电动汽车，将使该汽车制造商成为像特斯拉一样家喻户晓的品牌
items.desc_en: The R2 SUV is meant to transform Rivian from a niche EV manufacturer that sells luxury vehicles into a more mainstream brand like U.S. EV leader Tesla.
items.desc_zh: R2 SUV 旨在将 Rivian 从一家销售豪华车的小众电动汽车制造商转变为像美国电动汽车领导者特斯拉一样更主流的品牌。

items.title_en: Inflation data threatens to derail market comeback. How the S&P 500 may react
items.title_zh: 通胀数据可能会阻碍市场复苏。标准普尔 500 指数可能会如何反应
items.desc_en: Investors will be watching core inflation in May closely to see just how long higher prices from the U.S.-Iran war may last, according to JPMorgan.
items.desc_zh: 摩根大通表示，投资者将密切关注 5 月份的核心通胀，以了解美伊战争带来的物价上涨可能持续多久。

items.title_en: Oil prices fall as Trump tries to convince market an Iran deal is close despite recent violence
items.title_zh: 尽管最近发生了暴力事件，特朗普仍试图说服市场与伊朗达成协议，油价下跌
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said a deal with Tehran to reopen Hormuz is close, but such an agreement still has not materialized.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统多次表示，与德黑兰就重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的协议已经接近，但这样的协议尚未实现。

items.title_en: The 'SaaSpocalypse' is over, says private equity giant Thoma Bravo. Here's why it sees an AI boom for software
items.title_zh: 私募股权巨头 Thoma Bravo 表示，“SaaS 末日”已经结束。这就是人工智能软件蓬勃发展的原因
items.desc_en: Thoma Bravo founder Orlando Bravo says AI offers an "enormous tailwind" for software companies.
items.desc_zh: Thoma Bravo 创始人 Orlando Bravo 表示，人工智能为软件公司提供了“巨大的推动力”。

items.title_en: U.S. stock futures rise as oil slides, chip stocks continue rebound: Live updates
items.title_zh: 随着油价下跌，美国股指期货上涨，芯片股继续反弹：实时更新
items.desc_en: A rally in chip stocks boosted the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite on Monday.
items.desc_zh: 芯片股周一上涨提振了标准普尔 500 指数和纳斯达克综合指数。

items.title_en: 5 takeaways from airline CEOs' biggest annual gathering
items.title_zh: 航空公司首席执行官最大的年度聚会的 5 个要点
items.desc_en: Airline CEOs met in Rio de Janeiro at IATA, the International Air Transport Association's annual meeting.
items.desc_zh: 航空公司首席执行官们在里约热内卢参加国际航空运输协会 (IATA) 年会。

items.title_en: Crew rescued after U.S. helicopter goes down near Iran - Axios
items.title_zh: 美国直升机在伊朗附近坠毁 机组人员获救 - Axios

items.title_en: Bitcoin's brutal sell-off sparks a flurry of trading in related stocks, including one big bullish bet
items.title_zh: 比特币的残酷抛售引发了相关股票的一系列交易，其中包括一个大的看涨押注
items.desc_en: The year has been a rocky one for the flagship cryptocurrency, but traders aren't backing away from the space.
items.desc_zh: 对于旗舰加密货币来说，今年是艰难的一年，但交易者并没有退出该领域。

items.title_en: Ariana Grande and Ethan Slater split after three years
items.title_zh: 阿丽亚娜·格兰德 (Ariana Grande) 与伊桑·斯莱特 (Ethan Slater) 交往三年后分手
items.desc_en: The pair met on the set of the first Wicked movie, for which Grande received an Oscar nomination.
items.desc_zh: 两人在第一部《魔法坏女巫》电影的片场相识，格兰德因此获得了奥斯卡提名。

items.title_en: 51% of U.S. adults say the American Dream is out of reach for most people right now: CNBC survey
items.title_zh: CNBC 调查显示，51% 的美国成年人表示，美国梦目前对大多数人来说遥不可及
items.desc_en: In an exclusive CNBC survey, 81% of respondents said the cost of living is their biggest financial hurdle to achieving the American Dream.
items.desc_zh: 在 CNBC 的一项独家调查中，81% 的受访者表示，生活成本是他们实现美国梦的最大财务障碍。

items.title_en: Tickets for Iran fans revoked, says federation
items.title_zh: 伊朗足协表示，伊朗球迷的门票已被吊销
items.desc_en: Iran's football federation says its allocation of tickets for the group stage of the World Cup has been revoked just days before the tournament.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗足协表示，就在比赛前几天，其世界杯小组赛门票的分配已被取消。

items.title_en: Nuvalent shares surge 39% after UK's GSK agrees to buy the cancer drugmaker for $10.6 billion
items.title_zh: 英国葛兰素史克 (GSK) 同意以 106 亿美元收购这家癌症制药商后，Nuvalent 股价飙升 39%
items.desc_en: The deal comes at a time of biotech dealmaking frenzy, driven by looming patent cliffs, newly buoyant public markets and drugmakers' race to bolster pipelines.
items.desc_zh: 这笔交易发生之际，正值生物技术交易狂潮之际，迫在眉睫的专利悬崖、新近活跃的公共市场以及制药商竞相加强管道建设。

items.title_en: Kenyan police fire tear gas at protest against US Ebola quarantine centre plan
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚警方发射催泪瓦斯抗议美国埃博拉检疫中心计划
items.desc_en: Protesters are concerned about cross-border infection risks and the lack of transparency from the government about the treatment centre.
items.desc_zh: 抗议者担心跨境感染风险以及政府对治疗中心缺乏透明度。

items.title_en: Man accused of killing mother-in-law with poison-laced satay
items.title_zh: 男子被控用有毒沙爹杀害婆婆
items.desc_en: Indonesia police allege the man killed the woman as he felt disrespected by her.
items.desc_zh: 印度尼西亚警方称，该男子因感到不受尊重而杀害了该女子。

items.title_zh: 连续几天目击黑熊在日本被捕

items.desc_zh: 宇都宫的抓捕事件发生之际，日本各地的熊袭击事件已达到创纪录水平。

items.title_zh: 菲律宾发生数百次余震，官员称死亡人数可能上升
items.desc_en: Dozens of people are dead and hundreds more injured following an earthquake in the country's south.
items.desc_zh: 该国南部发生地震，造成数十人死亡、数百人受伤。

items.title_en: ICC suspends top prosecutor after investigating misconduct allegations
items.title_zh: 国际刑事法院在调查不当行为指控后暂停了高级检察官的职务
items.desc_en: Karim Khan denies all allegations of sexual misconduct and his lawyers say he rejects the decision in the strongest terms.
items.desc_zh: 卡里姆·汗否认所有不当性行为的指控，他的律师表示，他以最强烈的措辞拒绝这一决定。

items.desc_zh: 习近平结束了对平壤为期两天的访问，这是他自 2019 年以来首次正式访问朝鲜。

items.desc_en: Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller lost his bid for a fourth term in a March Republican primary, despite Trump's endorsement.

items.title_zh: OpenAI拟上市，与Anthropic的投资竞赛加剧
items.desc_en: The company behind ChatGPT filed its plans one week after Anthropic did the same.
items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 背后的公司在 Anthropic 提交计划一周后也提出了同样的计划。

items.title_en: Apple partnering with Google and Nvidia for most advanced AI model
items.title_zh: 苹果与谷歌和英伟达合作开发最先进的人工智能模型
items.desc_en: Apple's artificial intelligence strategy took center stage at its Worldwide Developers Conference in Cupertino, Calif.
items.desc_zh: 苹果的人工智能战略在加利福尼亚州库比蒂诺举行的全球开发者大会上成为焦点。

items.title_en: Apple unveils Siri AI makeover as Tim Cook bids farewell
items.title_zh: 蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 告别之际，苹果推出 Siri AI 改造版
items.desc_en: The technology giant also revealed a series of new child safety features amid widespread scrutiny over "nudification" apps.
items.desc_zh: 在对“裸体”应用程序的广泛审查中，这家科技巨头还推出了一系列新的儿童安全功能。

items.title_en: Kimi Work
items.title_zh: Kimi Work

items.desc_zh: 用于知识工作的 AI 桌面

items.title_en: Jailed crypto founder Sam Bankman-Fried seeks Trump pardon
items.title_zh: 被监禁的加密货币创始人萨姆·班克曼·弗里德寻求特朗普赦免
items.desc_en: The former leader of crypto platform FTX, currently serving a 25-year sentence, on Monday officially applied to be pardoned.
items.desc_zh: 加密货币平台 FTX 的前领导人目前正在服刑 25 年，周一正式申请赦免。

items.title_en: Lebanon says Israel has bombed it nearly 3,500 times during ceasefire - Reuters
items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩称以色列在停火期间对其进行了近3500次轰炸 - 路透
items.desc_en: Lebanon says Israel has bombed it nearly 3,500 times during ceasefire  ReutersLive updates: Iran war news, Israel strikes on Lebanon  CNNChristian Leaders in the Lebanese City of Tyre Urge for Action
items.desc_zh: 黎巴嫩称，以色列在停火期间对其进行了近 3,500 次轰炸 路透社实时更新：伊朗战争新闻，以色列袭击黎巴嫩 CNN 黎巴嫩提尔市的基督教领袖敦促采取行动

items.title_en: Starmer tells Apple and Google to ban nude images on children's phones
items.title_zh: 斯塔默告诉苹果和谷歌禁止儿童手机上出现裸照
items.desc_en: Firms will be expected to activate built-in features to stop children accessing sexually explicit images.
items.desc_zh: 公司将被期望激活内置功能来阻止儿童访问露骨的色情图片。

items.title_en: Oil prices edge higher after strikes on Israel test ceasefire
items.title_zh: 以色列空袭测试停火后油价小幅上涨
items.desc_en: Iran said the attacks, its first since an April ceasefire, are the start of "a full week" of strikes
items.desc_zh: 伊朗表示，这是自四月份停火以来的首次袭击，也是“整整一周”袭击的开始

items.title_en: The gamers taking on the industry to stop it switching off games
items.title_zh: 游戏玩家向行业发起挑战，阻止其关闭游戏
items.desc_en: Stop Killing Games is challenging the idea publishers can shut down a game without making sure it's still playable.
items.desc_zh: Stop Killing Games 正在挑战发行商可以在不确保游戏仍然可玩的情况下关闭游戏的想法。

items.title_en: Trump to meet AI leaders to discuss US investment in their companies
items.title_zh: 特朗普将与人工智能领导人会面，讨论美国对其公司的投资
items.desc_en: The US president said on Friday he expects to meet the leaders of top AI companies next week.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统周五表示，他预计下周将与顶级人工智能公司的领导人会面。

items.title_en: Raspberry Pi raises profit forecast as AI demand grows
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能需求的增长，Raspberry Pi 提高了利润预期
items.desc_en: The firm said it expected to deliver adjusted earnings of at least $38m (£28.2m) for the first half of 2026.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，预计 2026 年上半年调整后收益至少为 3800 万美元（2820 万英镑）。

items.title_zh: 从比特币到区块链：关键的加密货币术语及其含义
items.desc_en: As the price of Bitcoin sinks once more, here's a guide to some of the trickiest crypto terms.
items.desc_zh: 随着比特币价格再次下跌，这里有一些最棘手的加密货币术语的指南。

items.title_en: The ancient trick making food waste useful and tasty
items.title_zh: 让食物垃圾变得有用又美味的古老技巧
items.desc_en: Instead of throwing away byproducts of food processing, fermentation is making them valuable.
items.desc_zh: 发酵并没有丢弃食品加工的副产品，而是使它们变得有价值。

items.title_en: Mark Zuckerberg's longest-serving employee on AI, jobs - and her boss
items.title_zh: 马克·扎克伯格在人工智能、就业领域任职时间最长的员工——以及她的老板
items.desc_en: Naomi Gleit has weathered many controversies at Meta, but remains in what she tells the BBC is her "dream job".
items.desc_zh: 娜奥米·格莱特 (Naomi Gleit) 在 Meta 经受住了许多争议，但仍然坚守在她告诉 BBC 的“梦想工作”岗位上。

items.title_en: AI needs a 'brake pedal', warns Anthropic co-founder
items.title_zh: Anthropic 联合创始人警告说，人工智能需要一个“刹车踏板”
items.desc_en: Jack Clark tells BBC's Newsnight AI could get to the point where it develops without human input.
items.desc_zh: 杰克·克拉克 (Jack Clark) 告诉 BBC 新闻之夜，人工智能可以在没有人类输入的情况下实现发展。

items.title_en: Who is Elon Musk and what is his net worth?
items.title_zh: 谁是埃隆·马斯克？他的净资产是多少？
items.desc_en: The boss of X, Tesla and SpaceX is the world's richest person and has used his platform to make his views known on a vast array of topics.
items.desc_zh: X、特斯拉和 SpaceX 的老板是世界上最富有的人，他利用自己的平台在广泛的话题上表达了自己的观点。
